findings.evidence: StudentCode property mapping lacks a comment explaining why there is no unique constraint: `entity.Property(u => u.StudentCode).IsRequired(false).HasMaxLength(50);`
findings.why_it_matters: The phase's Risk Mitigation section explicitly calls for documenting that StudentCode has no uniqueness constraint per business requirements. Future maintainers may not understand this is intentional and could attempt to add a unique constraint that breaks backward compatibility.
findings.required_action: Add a code comment to the StudentCode property mapping in IdentityDbContext explaining that student codes are intentionally not unique per business requirements (each school's MSSV format may differ). For example: `// Note: StudentCode is intentionally not unique; different schools may reuse codes. Add a unique constraint only when the school's MSSV format is known.`
